basic_details.job_title: NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant and Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur) Project Assistant and Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Hamirpur. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Hamirpur Project Assistant and Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates with an age limit of 30 years for Project Assistant and 35 years for Project Associate-I, who possess the required educational qualifications (Diploma/Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering/Technology/Architecture), are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The online application pro

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Assistant is 30 years and for Project Associate-I is 35 years as on last date of receipt of application. Upper age limit will be relaxed up to five years for reserved category candidates (SC/ST/PWD) and three years for OBC non-creamy layer candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Civil Engineering / Technology / Architecture or B.Tech/B.E
qualification.details: Project Assistant (Field Assistant / Office Assistant): Diploma in Civil Engineering / Technology / Architecture or higher with at least 60% marks from a recognized university (Incase of CGPI, conversion factor of CGPI to %age be given). Project Associate-I: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology or higher with at least 60% marks from a recognized university (Incase of CGPI, conversion factor of CGPI to %age be given).

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Rs. 29,700/- - Rs. 40,700/- Per Month Project Associate-I: Rs. 29,700/- - Rs. 40,700/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Hamirpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Hamirpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the Project Assistant and Project Associate-I posts is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the posts of Project Assistant and Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Assistant?
faq.answer: For Project Assistant, a Diploma in Civil Engineering / Technology / Architecture or higher with at least 60% marks is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering / Technology or higher with at least 60% marks is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Project Assistant and Project Associate-I is Rs. 29,700/- to Rs. 40,700/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Project Assistant and Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for Project Assistant and 35 years for Project Associate-I, with relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NIT Hamirpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Technical Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official NIT Hamirpur website on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.
